parameters.content: ## Content Approval Engine & LinkedIn Auto Post Publishing

## Blog scanner

This section checks for new blogs automatically and fetches the latest blog from the RSS feed.

## Blog Validation

This section checks whether the blog is already processed or new. Only new blogs will continue in the workflow.
This section cleans and organizes the blog data into a proper format for the next workflow steps.
This section saves the processed blog into Google Sheets to avoid duplicate processing in future runs.
This is execute the sub workflow

parameters.content: This workflow receives blog content from the Blog Detection workflow for AI content generation.

## Employee Persona Setup

This section creates different employee roles and prepares personalized content generation for each role.

## AI Content Generation

This section uses AI to generate personalized LinkedIn posts based on employee role and blog content.
This section stores all generated LinkedIn posts into Google Sheets for approval tracking.

## Approval or Rejection Process

This section sends approval and rejection links through email for manual review before LinkedIn publishing.

parameters.text: Alert Post is not created due to some error

parameters.content:
Receives approve or reject action from email links.
Fetches the selected LinkedIn post data from Google Sheets.

Checks whether the post is approved or rejected.
Updates the approval status inside Google Sheets.
Sends a success response back to the browser after decision is saved.

Fetches approved posts and checks whether they were already published.
Prepares the final LinkedIn post content.

Connects with LinkedIn API and publishes the approved content automatically.
Verifies whether the post was successfully created.
Updates Google Sheets after successful publishing.
Sends Slack alert if LinkedIn posting fails.

## How it works

This automation system helps manage the complete LinkedIn content workflow automatically.
First, the workflow scans Medium blogs at scheduled intervals and detects new blog posts. New blog details are stored in Google Sheets for tracking.

Next, AI generates personalized LinkedIn posts for different employee roles like CEO, HR, Developer, and Marketing using different tones and writing styles. The generated posts are saved with Pending status and approval emails are sent automatically.

When the user clicks Approve or Reject from the email, the workflow updates the status in Google Sheets. If approved, the system checks whether the post is already published and then automatically publishes it on LinkedIn using the LinkedIn API.

After successful posting, the workflow updates the published status. If any issue occurs during publishing, a Slack alert is sent for monitoring.


## Setup steps
**1.** Configure the Schedule Trigger and RSS Feed nodes for blog detection.
**2.** Connect Google Sheets to save processed blogs and generated posts.
**3.** Configure OpenAI credentials for AI-based LinkedIn content generation.
**4.** Create employee role-based AI prompts for personalized posts.
**5.** Configure Gmail to send approval and rejection emails.
**6.** Setup Webhook nodes to receive approval actions from email links.
**7.** Configure LinkedIn OAuth credentials for automatic LinkedIn posting.
**8.** Add Slack integration for failure alerts and workflow monitoring.
